# Text Blocks

<!-- START TOKEN(Autogenerated block API docs) -->
- [Code](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-code/) — `core/code`: Display code snippets that respect your spacing and tabs.
- [Details](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-details/) — `core/details`: Hide and show additional content.
- [Footnotes](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-footnotes/) — `core/footnotes`: Display footnotes added to the page.
- [Classic](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-freeform/) — `core/freeform`: Use the classic WordPress editor.
- [Heading](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-heading/) — `core/heading`: Introduce new sections and organize content to help visitors (and search engines) understand the structure of your content.
- [List](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-list/) — `core/list`: An organized collection of items displayed in a specific order.
- [List Item](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-list-item/) — `core/list-item`: An individual item within a list.
- [Math](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-math/) — `core/math`: Display mathematical notation using LaTeX.
- [Unsupported](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-missing/) — `core/missing`: Your site doesn’t include support for this block.
- [Paragraph](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-paragraph/) — `core/paragraph`: Start with the basic building block of all narrative.
- [Preformatted](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-preformatted/) — `core/preformatted`: Add text that respects your spacing and tabs, and also allows styling.
- [Pullquote](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-pullquote/) — `core/pullquote`: Give special visual emphasis to a quote from your text.
- [Quote](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-quote/) — `core/quote`: Give quoted text visual emphasis. "In quoting others, we cite ourselves." — Julio Cortázar
- [Table](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-table/) — `core/table`: Create structured content in rows and columns to display information.
- [Poetry](https://developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/reference-guides/core-blocks/core-blocks-text/core-block-verse/) — `core/verse`: Insert poetry. Use special spacing formats. Or quote song lyrics.

<!-- END TOKEN(Autogenerated block API docs) -->
